name: Ice Beak
author: Poki
description: Ice Beak is a fast-paced action game where you control a fearless ice-powered bird! Navigate icy landscapes, dodge dangers, and unleash powerful snowballs to freeze obstacles and enemies in your path. But watch out—your ammo is limited! Find checkpoints to reload and keep the adventure going. Can you brave the cold and conquer the challenges ahead? How to play Ice Beak? Use the arrow keys to move around Who created Ice Beak? Ice Beak was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Bad Ice-Cream 3 ! How can I play Ice Beak for free? You can play Ice Beak for free on Poki.
